glosses.ja: はっきりさせる; 解決する

translations.en: We need to sort this out today.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天得把这件事解决了。
translations.yue: 我哋今日要搞掂呢件事。
translations.ru: Нам нужно разобраться с этим сегодня.
translations.pt: A gente precisa resolver isso hoje.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לסדר את זה היום.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần giải quyết việc này hôm nay.
translations.ar: يجب أن نحلّ هذا الأمر اليوم.
translations.nb: Vi må ordne dette i dag.
translations.sv: Vi måste lösa det här idag.
translations.da: Vi skal ordne det i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はこれを片付けないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; clausal subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (1pl); finite verb in V2 position selecting a bare infinitive at clause end; expresses necessity.
Unstressed demonstrative/personal pronoun, neuter accusative; direct object referring to given information.
Temporal adverb setting the time frame; appears in the midfield.
Bare infinitive main verb; complement selected by the modal auxiliary, placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Das klären wir gleich nach dem Meeting.
sentences.reading: /das ˈklɛːʁən viːɐ̯ ɡlaɪ̯ç naːx deːm ˈmiːtɪŋ/

translations.de: Das klären wir gleich nach dem Meeting.
translations.ipa: /das ˈklɛːʁən viːɐ̯ ɡlaɪ̯ç naːx deːm ˈmiːtɪŋ/
translations.en: We’ll clear that up right after the meeting.
translations.es: Lo aclaramos justo después de la reunión.
translations.fr: On règle ça juste après la réunion.
translations.it: Lo sistemiamo subito dopo la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 开完会我们马上把这事解决掉。
translations.yue: 開完會我哋就即刻搞掂嗰件事。
translations.ru: Мы разберёмся с этим сразу после встречи.
translations.pt: A gente resolve isso logo depois da reunião.
translations.he: נסגור את זה מיד אחרי הפגישה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ giải quyết việc đó ngay sau cuộc họp.
translations.nl: We lossen dat meteen na de vergadering op.
translations.uk: Ми розберемося з цим одразу після наради.
translations.hu: A megbeszélés után rögtön tisztázzuk ezt.
translations.hi: मीटिंग के तुरंत बाद हम इसे सुलझा लेंगे.
translations.el: Θα το ξεκαθαρίσουμε αμέσως μετά τη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Vi ordner det med en gang etter møtet.
translations.id: Kita akan menyelesaikan itu langsung setelah rapat.
translations.sv: Vi reder ut det direkt efter mötet.
translations.da: Vi får styr på det lige efter mødet.
translations.ja: 会議のあとすぐにそれを片付けます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative/personal pronoun in accusative; topicalized object in the Vorfeld.
Finite main verb in V2 position, present indicative (1pl); forms the predicate with subject following.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject following the finite verb per V2 word order.
Modal/temporal adverb meaning ‘soon/right away’; modifies the predicate.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular; agrees with the following neuter noun.
Common noun (loanword), neuter; object of the preposition ‘nach’ in dative case.

sentences.target: Du kannst das mit ihr klären.

translations.de: Du kannst das mit ihr klären.
translations.en: You can sort that out with her.
translations.fr: Tu peux régler ça avec elle.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以跟她把这事解决了。
translations.yue: 你可以同佢搞掂呢件事。
translations.ru: Ты можешь решить это с ней.
translations.pt: Você pode resolver isso com ela.
translations.he: אתה יכול לסדר את זה איתה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giải quyết chuyện đó với cô ấy.
translations.nl: Je kunt dat met haar oplossen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш вирішити це з нею.
translations.hi: तुम यह बात उससे सुलझा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να το λύσεις μαζί της.
translations.nb: Du kan ordne det med henne.
translations.sv: Du kan reda ut det med henne.
translations.da: Du kan ordne det med hende.
translations.ja: それは彼女と話をつけられるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; clausal subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (2sg); finite verb in V2 selecting a bare infinitive at clause end; expresses ability/possibility.
Pronoun, neuter accusative; direct object.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a comitative prepositional phrase.
Personal pronoun, dative singular feminine; object of the preposition ‘mit’ (meaning ‘with her’).
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary, placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Das Problem klären sie noch heute.

translations.de: Das Problem klären sie noch heute.
translations.es: Hoy van a solucionar el problema.
translations.fr: Ils vont régler le problème aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们今天会把问题解决掉。
translations.yue: 佢哋今日會搞掂個問題。
translations.pt: Eles vão resolver o problema hoje.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ giải quyết vấn đề hôm nay.
translations.nl: Ze lossen het probleem vandaag op.
translations.hi: वे आज समस्या का समाधान कर देंगे.
translations.id: Mereka akan menyelesaikan masalah itu hari ini.
translations.ja: 彼らは今日その問題を解決します。

tokens.explanation: Determiner (demonstrative/definite) modifying ‘Problem’; forms the NP in the Vorfeld.
Common noun, neuter; topicalized direct object NP preceding the finite verb.
Finite verb in V2 position, present indicative (3pl); agrees with ‘sie’.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural nominative; clausal subject following the finite verb.
Adverb intensifying the temporal frame; in ‘noch heute’ indicates ‘still today/by today’.
Temporal adverb; together with ‘noch’ forms the adverbial phrase ‘noch heute’.
